name: focus
title: Focus
description: Control Focus App – Website and App Blocker for Mac
author: ernest

commands.name: start-focus
commands.title: Start Focus Session
commands.subtitle: Focus
commands.description: Quickly start Focus with default or single profile

commands.name: start-focus-with-profile
commands.title: Start Focus Session with Profile
commands.subtitle: Focus
commands.description: Start Focus by selecting a profile

commands.name: start-focus-custom
commands.title: Start Focus Session - Custom Duration
commands.subtitle: Focus
commands.description: Start a focus session with custom duration

commands.name: take-break-custom
commands.title: Break - Custom Duration
commands.subtitle: Focus
commands.description: Take a break with custom duration

commands.name: stop-break
commands.title: End Break
commands.subtitle: Focus
commands.description: Stop break and continue the current focus session.

tools.name: get-status
tools.title: Get Focus Status
tools.description: Returns whether a focus session or break is currently active, the active profile, and all available profiles

tools.name: start-focus
tools.title: Start Focus Session
tools.description: Starts a focus session. Optionally specify a profile name and/or duration in hours and minutes

tools.name: stop-focus
tools.title: Stop Focus Session
tools.description: Stops the currently active focus session

tools.name: take-break
tools.title: Take a Break
tools.description: Takes a break from the current focus session. Defaults to 5 minutes, or specify a custom duration

ai.instructions: Use this extension to control the Focus app on macOS, which blocks distracting websites and apps. Always call get-status first to check the current state before starting or stopping sessions. Use the available profiles from get-status when the user mentions a profile by name.

expected.meetsCriteria: Confirms a focus session is active with the Work profile
